_meta.name: ALM 32B r1 — RunPod H100 80GB pod-create spec
_meta.status: PREP (NOT FIRED — waiting for r10 14B completion + eval green)
_meta.purpose: First ALM 32B fine-tune — fresh LoRA r=32 α=64 on chatml-stripped corpus, B1 OFF, 2000-step cap (mirrors r10 config at 32B scale).
_meta.corpus_source: /workspace/corpus_alm_70b_stripped.txt (same as r10; pod-generated from R2 corpus_alm_70b.jsonl)
_meta.escalation_gate: r10 (14B) step_2000 eval must show (a) no mode collapse, (b) Korean fluency maintained, (c) CE monotone non-increasing over last 400 steps. Only then fire 32B r1.
memory_refs: feedback_one_shot_best (2e-6 const LR matches r10 one-shot-best)
feedback_no_resume_data_change (fresh step 0 for new param class)
runpod_mfs_quota (training/CLAUDE.md — save_every=2000, clean ckpt dir, post-training bulk R2 upload)
fire_with: #   1. r10 (14B) complete AND eval green AND explicit escalation order

name: anima-alm32b-r1

_capacity_rationale.gpuCount: 1 × H100 80GB: Qwen2.5-32B bf16 = 65 GB + LoRA r=32 adapters = 0.4 GB + AdamW optimizer (LoRA-only) ~1.6 GB + activations at batch=1 seq=1024 with grad_checkpointing ~4-6 GB = ~71 GB used, 9 GB headroom. Tight but single-GPU viable — FSDP not required at 32B. Compare 70B (145 GB) which mandates 4 × H100 FSDP.
_capacity_rationale.containerDiskInGb: 200 GB: 32B base 65 GB + HF cache 20 GB + corpus 0.5 GB + adapter 0.4 GB + ckpt 0.4 GB + strip intermediate 5 GB = ~91 GB peak, 109 GB headroom vs MFS quota margin. 150 GB (14B spec) insufficient — 32B needs +50 GB.
_capacity_rationale.minMemoryInGb: 96: 32B safetensor loading staging buffer + HF rclone streaming + DataLoader. 14B used 64 GB; 32B needs +32 GB for load-time staging.
_capacity_rationale.vcpuCount: 24: rclone parallel transfers (8) + dataloader workers + liger/unsloth compile overhead. 14B used 16; 32B benefits from +8 for faster R2 mirror upload.

_cost_estimate.chosen_path: smoke first (200 steps, ~$2 inc. base DL) — validate first-batch CE + kr_gen sanity; then production (2000 steps, ~$20)

_post_create_steps: 1. runpodctl ssh info <pod_id>           # get ip + port
3. # Stage bootstrap + launcher + sentinel + corpus strip tool + rclone.conf + hexa:
4. # Export HF_TOKEN on pod for 32B download:
6. # If smoke sentinel CLEAN + CE decreasing, production:
ssh ... 'tmux new -d -s alm32b-r1 "source ~/.bashrc && hexa run /workspace/anima/training/deploy/alm32b_r1_bootstrap.hexa production 2>&1 | tee /workspace/alm32b_r1_prod.log"'
_abort_criteria: MFS quota dd preflight FAILS → terminate pod, rebuild (runpod_mfs_quota rule)
HF_TOKEN unset → bootstrap refuses (32B not in R2 on first run)
32B base downloaded < 60 GB → incomplete, abort (shard missing)
First-batch CE > 8.0 → base/corpus mismatch, abort (r10 saw CE=1.43 — 32B should be similar)
kr_gen sentinel reports COLLAPSED at any 200-step checkpoint → abort + save prior step
step=1 loss > 8.0 → abort (same threshold as r10 per deviation log)
Wall clock > 10h with CE still > 2.5 → stop, save best ckpt
Pod unresponsive (R12) → terminate + last saved ckpt only

_post_training_r2_upload.wait_for: training process exit (no in-training upload — MFS quota trap per runpod_mfs_quota)

_teardown.trigger: step_2000/train_meta.json present AND R2 upload verified AND kr_gen_step_2000.json CLEAN
_teardown.principle: Idle 0s → immediate teardown after R2 verify. smoke $2 (30 min), production $20 (5-8 h).

_escalation_path.next_rung: 70B r1 — alm70b_4pod (requires USER_OK_4POD=1 + A2-merged adapter lineage + 4 × H100 FSDP)
gating_criteria: 32B r1 evaluator shows Korean fluency ≥ r10 baseline
No mode collapse in any saved checkpoint
_escalation_path.prep_dependency: shared/state/alm_70b_spec.json + shared/state/alm_70b_launch_checklist_20260417.json already staged; 32B r1 success unlocks 70B
